title: QR Token Print: Print instructions + cut lines

close_reason: Implemented: Print instructions (collapsible section with cut lines, paper, QR size, background) and cut lines in template; QR 32mm per spec.

title: BD-010: Station CRUD API + admin UI (nested under program)
description: Per 08-API-SPEC-PHASE1 Section 5.3, 04-DATA-MODEL Table 4. GET/POST programs/{id}/stations, PUT/DELETE stations/{id}. Enforce unique name per program, role_type enum. UI: station list with role_type badges, create/edit modal. Delete blocked if referenced by track steps. Depends on BD-008.

title: Fix modal centering and closed-dialog visibility
description: Modal centering: Added global dialog[open] styles (position:fixed, inset:0, flex center, full viewport) in app.css and class .modal-dialog-center for specificity. Applied modal-dialog-center to Modal.svelte and inline dialogs on Station and TrackOverrides. Bug fix: Initially styling all 'dialog' made closed dialogs visible (override UA hide). Changed selectors to dialog[open] and dialog[open].modal-dialog-center so only open dialogs get centering; closed dialogs stay hidden. Also added .modal-backdrop for click-to-close form (DaisyUI migration).

title: BD-007: Create shared Svelte layout components
description:
### BD-007: Create shared Svelte layout components
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Layouts per `09-UI-ROUTES-PHASE1.md` Section 2. Design system per `07-UI-UX-SPECS.md`. Component mapping per `07-UI-UX-SPECS.md` Section 6.
- **Dependencies**: BD-001.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - `AppShell.svelte`: wraps all auth pages using DaisyUI `navbar` (header) + custom footer.
  - `AdminLayout.svelte`: extends AppShell using DaisyUI `drawer` + `menu` (240px sidebar nav).
  - `MobileLayout.svelte`: full-width using DaisyUI `navbar` (top) + `dock` (bottom bar).
  - `DisplayLayout.svelte`: minimal chrome for kiosk mode (DaisyUI `navbar` header only).
  - `StatusFooter.svelte`: connection indicator, queue count, clock.
  - `Toast.svelte` + `toastStore`: notification system using DaisyUI `toast` + `alert` components.
  - `OfflineBanner.svelte`: listens to `navigator.onLine`, shows/hides DaisyUI `alert alert-warning` banner.
  - `Modal.svelte`: generic `<dialog>` wrapper using DaisyUI `modal` + `modal-box`.
  - All layouts use DaisyUI semantic classes per `07-UI-UX-SPECS.md` — no raw utility-only styling for standard components.

title: QR Scanner: camera selection, file fallback, sound on scan
description: Enhanced QrScanner.svelte: getCameras() with dropdown for 2+ cameras; file-scan fallback when no camera/permission denied; optional soundOnScan prop (Web Audio beep). Triage and Station use soundOnScan=true. Plan: qr_scanner_enhancement_8c9dd7f0.

title: Modal: only Close/Cancel close; no click-outside
description: Modal close behavior: only explicit Close/Cancel (and optionally Escape) should close; no click-outside or mouse-leave. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 1).

title: Flow Visualization tab under Programs
description: Add Flow Visualization tab to Admin Programs Show. FlowVisualization.svelte: Informant Desk (Triage), track containers, station boxes with Queue Display links, flow arrows, legend. Per plan Part B.

title: MSWDO Tagudin realistic seeder
description: DatabaseSeeder with 1 admin (Lourdes Valdez) + 6 staff (Maria Santos, Juan Dela Cruz, Rosa Reyes, Jose Garcia, Ana Flores, Pedro Villanueva). Programs: AICS, Social Pension, Supplemental Feeding, Certificate of Indigency, E2E Test. Process-based tracks and station_process links. Password: password, PIN: 123456.

title: Print Template: Form Requests (UpdatePrintSettingsRequest + UploadSlipDocxRequest)
description: UpdatePrintSettingsRequest: add slip_* validation rules. UploadSlipDocxRequest: file required, mimes:docx, max:2048. Per plan §2.2.

description: These must be completed first. They establish the project skeleton.

title: Station Index: Svelte unclosed script fix
description: Compile error: script left open at line 123. Cause: string '< 1 min' in formatDuration(); Svelte parser treated < as tag start. Fix: use Unicode escape '\u003C 1 min' (displays same).

title: Edge Cases (BD-031 — BD-032)
Station Flow (BD-019 — BD-027)

title: Tokens page: Actions dropdown Skeleton UI
description: Replaced DaisyUI dropdown/menu with Skeleton-friendly markup. Explicit text-surface-950 for readable text; absolute positioned menu; fixed backdrop for outside click. Resolves white text unreadable (DaisyUI remnants).

title: Session bind API + Triage UI: POST /api/sessions/bind, QR scanner, category/track select, confirm flow
description: Per 08-API-SPEC-PHASE1 §3.1: POST /api/sessions/bind with qr_hash, track_id, client_category. Handle 409 (token in_use), 409 (lost/damaged), 400 (no active program). Triage page: QR scanner (camera + manual fallback), category selector, track select, confirm bar. Double-scan modal deferred to follow-up. Needs Token API (BD-011) and active program with tracks.

title: Temporary seeder: 6 staff users with Filipino names
description: Created StaffFilipinoNamesSeeder.php with Maria Santos, Juan Dela Cruz, Rosa Reyes, Jose Garcia, Ana Flores, Pedro Villanueva. Password: password, PIN: 123456. Run: sail artisan db:seed --class=StaffFilipinoNamesSeeder

title: Clean up AI slop from UI kit: remove decorative em dashes and improve empty states
description:
Removed all decorative em dashes (—) from components.html UI kit and replaced with proper design patterns:

- Typography annotations: Changed 'Heading 1 — text-4xl' to styled spans with proper sizing info
- Status messages: Changed 'Offline — connection lost' to 'Offline: connection lost'
- Table/station names: Changed 'Table 2 — Interview' to 'Table 2 (Interview)' with proper styling
- Empty states: Replaced decorative '—' symbols with proper empty state icons (X in circle) and descriptive text like 'Empty' or 'No clients'
- Descriptions: Changed 'Mobile (375px) — Staff processes' to 'Mobile (375px) for staff to process'
- Code annotations: Improved spacing and styling for code examples

All decorative dashes removed except legitimate ones in CSS comments and page title. UI kit now has clean, professional appearance without placeholder 'AI slop'.

title: Rename Start/Stop Program to Start session / Stop session in UI
description: Replace 'Activate'/'Stop Program'/'Deactivate' with session-oriented copy: button labels 'Start session' and 'Stop session', modal title/message/confirm (e.g. 'Stop session?' / 'You can only stop when no clients are in the queue.'). Update Programs Index and Programs Show. Keep API endpoints activate/deactivate; only UI copy and aria/labels change. Per user request: use 'Stop session' (not 'Stop Program') for clearer meaning.

title: Admin & Program UI: Skeleton adherence, white text fix, layout
description: Completed: (1) Theme: preset-outlined/preset-tonal and form labels in main use dark text (flexiqueue.css). (2) Dashboard: View Program button on Active Program card; Quick Actions restructured (Program & Setup, People & Reports) with preset-tonal. (3) Programs Index: View button on each program card. (4) Program Show: Start session button when inactive; Overview tab first; Skeleton-compatible tab styling; Settings tab with readable text and UI-friendly help (border-l blocks). (5) Program Show layout: back link, header, status/action banners with p-5 and flex wrap; Open Triage in LIVE banner.

Row actions: add Print (and row action) when status selected

title: Station queue UI: call next, transfer, complete, cancel, no-show

Show now_serving, waiting list, primary action (Transfer/Complete), secondary actions (Override, Cancel), No-show. Station selection for staff/supervisor. Depends on Flow Engine APIs (flexiqueue-fme closed).

title: Document frontend/Inertia gotchas in developing-gotchas rule

Globs: resources/js/**/*.svelte, app.js, vite.config.js, package.json.

title: Supervisor Override (BD-028 — BD-030)
Staff assignment program-scope fix: Station page and policies use ProgramStationAssignment
description:
Implemented plan so staff assigned via Admin → Programs → [program] → Staff tab see their station when logging in even if assigned_station_id was never synced.

Changes:
- StationPageController: resolve station via user->assignedStationForProgram(program->id) instead of assigned_station_id only.
- StationPolicy: staff auth uses assignedStationForProgram(station->program_id).
- SessionPolicy: view/update use assignedStationForProgram(session->program_id).
- ProgramService.activate(): added syncAssignedStationForProgram() to sync users.assigned_station_id when a program is activated (set for staff with ProgramStationAssignment, null for others in that program).

Tests added:
- StationQueueApiTest: staff with ProgramStationAssignment but null assigned_station_id can fetch queue.
- ProgramControllerTest: activate syncs assigned_station_id from program_station_assignments.
- RoleAccessTest: staff with program_station_assignment sees station on station page.

Plan ref: .cursor/plans/staff_assignment_program-scope_fix_2ccb4f9f.plan.md

title: BD-003: Create database migrations for all Phase 1 tables
description:
### BD-003: Create database migrations for all Phase 1 tables
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Schema per `04-DATA-MODEL.md`. 8 tables: programs, service_tracks, track_steps, stations, tokens, sessions, transaction_logs, users (extended).
- **Dependencies**: BD-001.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - Migration files for all 8 tables with exact column types, nullability, and defaults from `04-DATA-MODEL.md`.
  - Foreign keys with correct ON DELETE behavior (CASCADE / RESTRICT as specified).
  - All indexes created (idx_sessions_active, idx_tokens_hash, idx_logs_session, etc.).
  - `users` table extended with `role`, `override_pin`, `assigned_station_id`, `is_active`.
  - `php artisan migrate:fresh` runs cleanly on empty MariaDB.
  - No `hardware_units` or `device_events` tables.

title: Station queue API + GET /api/stations: queue data for station page

GET /api/stations returns stations for active program with queue_count, assigned_staff. Enforce staff assigned to station or supervisor/admin. Unblocks Station UI (call next, transfer, etc).

(2) AppShell, AdminLayout, MobileLayout: h-screen overflow-hidden, main min-h-0 overflow-y-auto so only main scrolls and footer/dock stay pinned at bottom.

title: BD-004: Create Eloquent models with relationships and business rule scopes
description:
### BD-004: Create Eloquent models with relationships and business rule scopes
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Relationships per `04-DATA-MODEL.md` Section "Relationship Summary". Business rules per Section "Key Business Rules".
- **Dependencies**: BD-003.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - Models: `Program`, `ServiceTrack`, `TrackStep`, `Station`, `Token`, `Session`, `TransactionLog`, `User`.
  - All `belongsTo`, `hasMany`, `hasOne` relationships defined.
  - `TransactionLog` model: `update()` and `delete()` throw exceptions (append-only enforcement).
  - Scopes: `Session::scopeActive()` (status in waiting, serving), `Program::scopeActive()` (is_active = true).
  - `User` model: `role` cast as enum, `override_pin` hidden from serialization.
  - `Token` model: `qr_code_hash` in `$guarded` (immutable after creation).
  - Casts: `capabilities` as array (if needed later), `metadata` as array on `TransactionLog`.

title: BD-006: Create role-based authorization middleware and policies
description:
### BD-006: Create role-based authorization middleware and policies
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: RBAC per `05-SECURITY-CONTROLS.md` Section 3. Middleware: `role:admin`, `role:admin,supervisor`, etc.
- **Dependencies**: BD-005.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - `EnsureRole` middleware: checks `auth()->user()->role` against allowed roles. Returns 403 if unauthorized.
  - Registered in `bootstrap/app.php` as `role` alias.
  - Route groups applied: admin routes require `role:admin`, override routes require `role:admin,supervisor`.
  - `SessionPolicy`: validates station-scoped access (staff can only act on their assigned station).
  - `StationPolicy`: staff can only view their assigned station's queue.
  - Policy registered in `AuthServiceProvider`.
  - Tests: staff cannot access admin routes (403), admin can access everything.

title: Process-Station Refactor: Phase 2 (FlowEngine, StationSelectionService, SessionService)
description: Per PROCESS-STATION-REFACTOR.md. FlowEngine returns process_id; StationSelectionService; SessionService bind/transfer wiring; station_selection_mode in program settings.

title: BD-001: Initialize Laravel 12 project with Svelte 5 + Inertia.js + TailwindCSS + DaisyUI
description:
### BD-001: Initialize Laravel 12 project with Svelte 5 + Inertia.js + TailwindCSS + DaisyUI
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Tech stack per `docs v1/11-tech-decisions.md` and `07-UI-UX-SPECS.md`. Laravel 12, Svelte 5 (via `@inertiajs/svelte`), TailwindCSS 4, DaisyUI 5.
- **Dependencies**: None (first task).
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - `composer create-project laravel/laravel` with Laravel 12.
  - Inertia.js server-side adapter installed (`inertiajs/inertia-laravel`).
  - Svelte 5 + Vite + `@inertiajs/svelte` configured.
  - TailwindCSS 4 installed with `Inter` font imported (bundled locally for offline).
  - DaisyUI 5 installed (`npm install -D daisyui@latest`).
  - DaisyUI configured in `resources/css/app.css` via `@plugin "daisyui"`.
  - FlexiQueue custom theme defined per `07-UI-UX-SPECS.md` Section 2.2.
  - A test page (`/`) renders a Svelte component via Inertia with DaisyUI classes working.
  - `npm run dev` and `php artisan serve` both work.

title: Track Overrides Refactor: API (Override, Permission, Auth list)

Server-side PHP QR library (chillerlan/php-qrcode or endroid/qr-code) for PNG; handle empty hash, library failure. Per docs/plans/QR-TOKEN-PRINT-SYSTEM.md QR-1, QR-2.

title: BD-005: Implement session-based authentication (login + logout)
description:
### BD-005: Implement session-based authentication (login + logout)
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Auth per `05-SECURITY-CONTROLS.md` Sections 2.1–2.3. Laravel session driver = database.
- **Dependencies**: BD-003, BD-004.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - Laravel Breeze or manual auth scaffolding (login form + controller).
  - `POST /login` authenticates via email + password.
  - On success: redirect based on role (admin → `/admin/dashboard`, staff → `/station`).
  - On failure: 422 with validation errors.
  - `POST /logout` invalidates session, redirects to `/login`.
  - Rate limiting: 5 attempts / 15 minutes (Laravel `ThrottlesLogins`).
  - Session driver set to `database` in `.env`.
  - `Login.svelte` page renders with Inertia.
  - Auth middleware applied to all non-public routes.

title: Log program session start and stop (audit trail)
description: When an admin starts or stops a program session (activate/deactivate), record an audit entry. Design: either (A) new table e.g. program_audit_log (program_id, staff_user_id, action: session_start|session_stop, created_at) or (B) extend transaction_logs to allow program-level actions (nullable session_id, program_id, new action_type values). Document choice in architecture; implement logging in ProgramService.activate and ProgramService.deactivate.
close_reason: Implemented program_audit_log (option A); ProgramService logs session_start/session_stop on activate/deactivate; doc in 04-DATA-MODEL; tests in ProgramControllerTest.

title: PIN/QR Auth: Override/force-complete UI (Authorize with PIN or QR, Temporary vs Preset)
description: Station page: auth picker integrating temp_pin, temp_qr, preset_pin, preset_qr. Per AUTH-5.

title: B2: Migrations program_supervisors, program_station_assignments, program_suggestions
description: Completed: New tables. Role enum (admin,staff). Migrated supervisors to program_supervisors.

title: Skeleton UI: fix white text on Station, Triage, Track Overrides (Live Session)
description:
Completed migration of remaining white/invisible text to Skeleton theme on mobile Live Session pages.

**Station (resources/js/Pages/Station/Index.svelte):**
- Root content div: added text-surface-950 for inheritance.
- Category badges: migrated badge-warning → preset-filled-warning-500, badge-ghost → preset-tonal text-surface-950; added text-surface-950 on badge span.
- Track chip: preset-outlined span + text-surface-950.
- Call Next block: token (nextSession.alias) and category badge spans + text-surface-950.
- Queue list: li + text-surface-950; token and badges inherit.
- Buttons: btn-warning → preset-filled-warning-500 (No-Show when 2+ attempts, Force Complete).
- All modal cards: text-surface-950 on card div; token/alias spans (font-mono font-semibold) + text-surface-950 in No-Show, Override, Force Complete, Call Next Override modals.

**Theme (resources/css/themes/flexiqueue.css):**
- Dialog labels: dialog .label, .label-text, .label-text-alt color var(--color-surface-950).
- Dialog card: dialog .card color var(--color-surface-950).
- Button presets in dialogs: dialog .btn.preset-outlined, dialog .btn.preset-tonal + same color override.
- Span presets: span.preset-outlined, span.preset-tonal + text color.
- Badge: span.badge.preset-tonal + text color.

**Triage (resources/js/Pages/Triage/Index.svelte):**
- Root content div: text-surface-950.

**Track Overrides (resources/js/Pages/TrackOverrides/Index.svelte):**
- Root content div: text-surface-950.
- Authorizations list: font-mono type (PIN/QR) + text-surface-950; Used/No expiry badge spans + text-surface-950.
- Pending requests: session alias span + text-surface-950.
- Reject buttons: preset-tonal btn-sm btn-error → preset-filled-error-500 btn-sm.
- Approve custom path modal: card + text-surface-950; path list items + text-surface-950.
- Reject modal: card + text-surface-950.

Ref: SKELETON-COMPONENT-MAPPING.md, DaisyUI→Skeleton migration.

title: Track Overrides Refactor: Migrations (awaiting_approval, override_steps, permission_requests)
description: Per docs/plans/TRACK-OVERRIDES-REFACTOR.md §1: Add awaiting_approval to session status enum; add queue_sessions.override_steps JSON; alter permission_requests: target_track_id, custom_steps, drop target_station_id.

title: Manuscript: Apply Word formatting margins font spacing
description: Capstone Ch1-2. Margins 1.5 L 1 R/T/B; TNR 12; double space; 0.5 indent; justified; page numbers top-right.
notes: Completed: Applied TNR 12pt, double spacing, justify, indent. NOTE: Page margins/page numbers need manual Word setup.

title: Refactor Admin Dashboard UI
description: Refactor Dashboard.svelte to use sub-components, lucide-svelte icons, and improved Skeleton UI styling.

title: Profile: better file-upload UI (replace/improve input type file)
description: Improve avatar file-upload UI; replace or improve input type file. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 8).

title: Triage Flow (BD-015 — BD-018)
QR Token Print: PDF export + HTML fallback
description: Dompdf/spatie for token sheet PDF download. HTML fallback with @media print on failure. Per QR-TOKEN-PRINT-SYSTEM.md QR-6.

title: PIN/QR Auth: Temporary QR (generate endpoint, staff scans)
description: POST /api/auth/temporary-qr. Return QR image. Validate scan token on override. Per AUTH-4.

title: Manuscript: Format tables 3-line open style in Word
description: Capstone Ch1-2. Tables 1 2 3: only top middle bottom borders 1.5pt; no sides. Bold Total in Table 2; lowercase n.
notes: Completed: Applied 3-line open style to Tables 1-3. Bolded 'Total' in Table 2.

title: Triage: Show Token A12 instead of Token Scanned
description: Extended GET /api/sessions/token-lookup to accept qr_hash (optional). When Triage has hash from QR scan, calls token-lookup?qr_hash=... to get physical_id for display. Same auth as physical_id lookup. Added test_token_lookup_by_qr_hash_returns_physical_id.

title: Polish & Infrastructure (BD-046 — BD-050)
Track Overrides Refactor: UI (Station modals, Track Overrides page)
description: Per TRACK-OVERRIDES-REFACTOR.md §4: Station Override modal track picker; Force Complete auth simplification; rename Authorize → Track Overrides; TTL dropdown, auth list, approve path, reject reassign.

title: Dependency Graph (Critical Path)
description: ```text

title: Triage: deactivated token → Token deactivated; logs fabricated scans
description: Show 'Token deactivated' (not 'Token not found') for deactivated token; log fabricated scan attempts. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 11).

title: Triage: Token not found when scanning printed QR
description: Root cause: printed QR contains full URL (e.g. http://host/display/status/HASH). Triage used first 10 chars as physical_id (e.g. http://loc). Fix: extract qr_hash from URL (last path segment, strip query string), set scannedToken with that hash so bind works. Debug logs confirmed H1.

title: Per-station Queue Display page (Display/Station.svelte + TTS)
description: New route GET /display/station/{station}. Display/Station.svelte: read-only queue view (now serving + waiting), Web Speech API TTS on call events, view_style and sound_enabled from station. Real-time via polling or WebSocket. Per plan Part A.1-A.6.

title: Manuscript: Bold beneficiary names in Importance remove markers
description: Capstone Ch1. In Word bold the 7 beneficiary names in Importance of the Study; remove double-asterisk markers.
notes: Completed: Bolded beneficiary names in Importance section. Removed ** markers.

title: Process-Station Refactor: Phase 3 (cutover, drop station_id)
description: Per PROCESS-STATION-REFACTOR.md. Step CRUD process_id; drop track_steps.station_id; Process CRUD API+UI; station process assignment.

title: Track: rename Steps button to Create steps / Manage steps when steps exist
description: Steps button label: 'Create steps' or 'Manage steps' when steps exist. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 21).

title: PIN/QR Auth: Preset PIN/QR Profile UI (hashed storage, admin cannot view)
description: User sets preset PIN/QR in Profile. Reset flow. Never expose to admin. Per PIN-QR-AUTHORIZATION-SYSTEM.md AUTH-2.
close_reason: Profile API (PUT override-pin, GET/POST override-qr); PinService.validatePresetQr; SessionController preset_qr in call/override/force-complete; Profile page (PIN form + QR regenerate); Profile link in AppShell and AdminLayout; tests: ProfileApiTest + override_with_preset_qr.

title: Suggested Sprint Plan (4-Week Capstone)
Display board (client-facing informant): GET /display, Now Serving, waiting summary, optional QR status
description: Per 09-UI-ROUTES §3.4: Display/Board.svelte. Public, no auth. Show program name, date, Now Serving grid, waiting by station. Initial data via controller; later WebSocket global.queue. Optional: GET /display/status/{qr_hash} for client QR check.

title: QR Token Print: Edge case tests
description: PHPUnit: no tokens, invalid IDs, in_use/lost/damaged, deleted mid-print, large batch, empty hash, base URL missing. Per QR-TOKEN-PRINT-SYSTEM.md QR-7.

title: Informant Display (BD-033 — BD-035)
Replace confirm(): Programs Show and Index modals
description: Replace each confirm() in Admin/Programs/Show.svelte (stop program, delete track, delete station, remove step) and Admin/Programs/Index.svelte (delete program) with ConfirmModal + state. Per REPLACE-CONFIRM-ALERT-WITH-MODALS.md.

title: Token API + Admin Tokens UI: GET/POST batch/PUT tokens, filter, BatchCreateModal, status update actions
description: Per 08-API-SPEC-PHASE1 §5.5: GET /api/admin/tokens (?status, ?search), POST /api/admin/tokens/batch ({prefix, count, start_number}), PUT /api/admin/tokens/{id} ({status}). Admin Tokens Index: table with status badge, filter bar, BatchCreateModal, action dropdown (Mark Lost, Damaged, Available). Depends on BD-010 (Program/Track/Station/Steps done). Unblocks triage bind.

title: Custom override single-process: show Complete not Send to next station
description: Single-process custom override: show Complete (not Send to next station); transfer hangs. Refer to docs/plans/ISSUES-ELABORATION-AND-CATEGORIZATION.md for full details (section 4).

title: B3: User helpers, PinService, policies (program-scoped supervisor)
description: Completed: User::isSupervisorForProgram, isAdmin, isSupervisorForAnyProgram. PinService, policies, EnsureRole updated. UserRole::Supervisor removed.

title: Staff Station UI: Queue Display controls
description: Add Queue Display section to Station/Index.svelte: Display URL link, View style dropdown (small/medium/large), Sound toggle. Load/save via display-settings API. Per plan Part A.3.

title: BD-002: Configure Laravel Reverb for local WebSocket server
description:
### BD-002: Configure Laravel Reverb for local WebSocket server
- **Type**: Foundation
- **Context**: Real-time per `08-API-SPEC-PHASE1.md` Section 7. Laravel Reverb on port 6001.
- **Dependencies**: BD-001.
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - `php artisan install:broadcasting` completed.
  - Laravel Reverb installed and configured in `.env` (local host, port 6001).
  - `laravel-echo` + `pusher-js` installed on frontend.
  - Echo initialized in `app.js` pointing to local Reverb.
  - `php artisan reverb:start` runs without errors.
  - A test broadcast event fires and is received by a Svelte component.
